<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>SVG line draw</title>
<style>
body{margin:0;min-height:100vh;display:grid;place-items:center;background:#111}
svg line{stroke:#fff;stroke-width:2;stroke-dasharray:200;stroke-dashoffset:200;transition:stroke-dashoffset 1.2s ease}
svg.on line{stroke-dashoffset:0}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<svg width="4" height="160" id="s"><line x1="2" y1="0" x2="2" y2="160"/></svg>
<script>
const s=document.getElementById('s');
new IntersectionObserver(e=>e.forEach(x=>x.isIntersecting&&s.classList.add('on')),{threshold:.5}).observe(s);
<\/script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>Magnetic button</title>
<style>
body{margin:0;min-height:100vh;display:grid;place-items:center;background:#111}
button{padding:12px 20px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #fff;background:transparent;color:#fff;font:14px system-ui;transition:transform .2s}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<button id="b">Get in touch</button>
<script>
const b=document.getElementById('b');
document.addEventListener('pointermove',e=>{
  const r=b.getBoundingClientRect(),cx=r.left+r.width/2,cy=r.top+r.height/2,dx=e.clientX-cx,dy=e.clientY-cy,d=Math.hypot(dx,dy);
  if(d<90){
    const f=Math.max(0,1-d/90);
    b.style.transform='translate('+(dx*f*.15)+'px,'+(dy*f*.15)+'px)';
  }else b.style.transform='';
});
<\/script>
</body>
</html>
snippets.25:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>Cursor trail</title>
<style>
body{margin:0;min-height:100vh;background:#111;overflow:hidden}
canvas{position:fixed;inset:0;pointer-events:none}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const c=document.getElementById('c'),x=c.getContext('2d');
let W,H,pts=[];
const rs=()=>{W=c.width=innerWidth;H=c.height=innerHeight;};
rs();
onresize=rs;
onpointermove=e=>pts.push({x:e.clientX,y:e.clientY,a:1});
(function loop(){
  x.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
  pts=pts.filter(p=>p.a>.02);
  pts.forEach(p=>{
    x.fillStyle='rgba(99,102,241,'+p.a+')';
    x.beginPath();
    x.arc(p.x,p.y,3,0,7);
    x.fill();
    p.a-=.04;
  });
  requestAnimationFrame(loop);
})();
<\/script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>Elastic blob</title>
<style>
body{margin:0;min-height:100vh;background:#111;cursor:none}
svg{position:fixed;pointer-events:none;transform:translate(-50%,-50%)}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<svg width="40" height="40" id="b"><ellipse cx="20" cy="20" rx="16" ry="16" fill="#fff"/></svg>
<script>
const b=document.getElementById('b'),e=b.firstElementChild;
let lx=0,ly=0;
document.onpointermove=ev=>{
  const vx=ev.clientX-lx,vy=ev.clientY-ly,s=Math.min(1.8,1+Math.hypot(vx,vy)*.02);
  e.setAttribute('rx',16*s);
  e.setAttribute('ry',16/Math.max(1,s*.5));
  b.style.left=ev.clientX+'px';
  b.style.top=ev.clientY+'px';
  lx=ev.clientX;
  ly=ev.clientY;
};
<\/script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>Canvas noise</title>
<style>
body{margin:0;overflow:hidden;background:#111}
canvas{display:block;width:100vw;height:100vh}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const c=document.getElementById('c'),x=c.getContext('2d');
let t=0;
function draw(){
  c.width=innerWidth;
  c.height=innerHeight;
  const id=x.createImageData(80,50);
  for(let i=0;i<id.data.length;i+=4){
    const v=128+Math.sin(i*.01+t)*40;
    id.data[i]=v*.3;
    id.data[i+1]=v*.2;
    id.data[i+2]=v*.8;
    id.data[i+3]=30;
  }
  x.putImageData(id,0,0);
  t+=.02;
  requestAnimationFrame(draw);
}
draw();
<\/script>
</body>
</html>
snippets.41:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>Star field</title>
<style>
body{margin:0;overflow:hidden;background:#111}
canvas{position:fixed;inset:0;opacity:.15}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const c=document.getElementById('c'),x=c.getContext('2d');
c.width=innerWidth;
c.height=innerHeight;
const stars=Array.from({length:60},()=>({
  x:Math.random()*c.width,
  y:Math.random()*c.height,
  r:Math.random()*1.5,
  s:.1+Math.random()*.3
}));
(function loop(){
  x.clearRect(0,0,c.width,c.height);
  stars.forEach(s=>{
    s.y+=s.s;
    if(s.y>c.height)s.y=0;
    x.fillStyle='#fff';
    x.beginPath();
    x.arc(s.x,s.y,s.r,0,7);
    x.fill();
  });
  requestAnimationFrame(loop);
})();
<\/script>
</body>
</html>

snippets.45:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>Ambient crackle</title>
<style>
body{margin:0;min-height:100vh;display:grid;place-items:center;background:#111;color:#fff;font:14px system-ui}
button{padding:10px 16px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #fff;background:transparent;color:#fff}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<button id="b">Start crackle</button>
<script>
let on=false,ctx,nodes;
document.getElementById('b').onclick=async()=>{
  ctx=ctx||new AudioContext();
  if(ctx.state==='suspended')await ctx.resume();
  if(on){
    nodes?.forEach(n=>n.stop());
    on=false;
    return;
  }
  const b=ctx.createBuffer(1,ctx.sampleRate*2,ctx.sampleRate),d=b.getChannelData(0);
  for(let i=0;i<d.length;i++)d[i]=Math.random()*2-1;
  const s=ctx.createBufferSource();
  s.buffer=b;
  s.loop=true;
  const f=ctx.createBiquadFilter();
  f.type='bandpass';
  f.frequency.value=900;
  const g=ctx.createGain();
  g.gain.value=.04;
  s.connect(f);
  f.connect(g);
  g.connect(ctx.destination);
  s.start();
  nodes=[s];
  on=true;
};
<\/script>
</body>
</html>
snippets.46:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>UI click sound</title>
<style>
body{margin:0;min-height:100vh;display:grid;place-items:center;background:#111}
button{padding:12px 18px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid #fff;background:transparent;color:#fff}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<button id="b">Send message</button>
<script>
document.getElementById('b').onclick=()=>{
  const ctx=new (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();
  const o=ctx.createOscillator(),g=ctx.createGain();
  o.frequency.value=800;
  g.gain.value=.08;
  o.connect(g);
  g.connect(ctx.destination);
  o.start();
  g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(.001,ctx.currentTime+.05);
  o.stop(ctx.currentTime+.05);
};
<\/script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>Canvas Ballpit</title>
<style>
body{margin:0;overflow:hidden;background:#111}
canvas{display:block;width:100vw;height:100vh}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const c=document.getElementById('c'),x=c.getContext('2d');
let w,h,mx=-999,my=-999;
const balls=[],colors=['#818cf8','#34d399','#fbbf24','#f43f5e','#a78bfa'];
const resize=()=>{w=c.width=innerWidth;h=c.height=innerHeight;};
resize();
onresize=resize;
for(let i=0;i<40;i++)balls.push({x:Math.random()*w,y:Math.random()*h,vx:(Math.random()-0.5)*3,vy:(Math.random()-0.5)*3,r:Math.random()*8+4,color:colors[Math.random()*colors.length|0]});
onpointermove=e=>{const r=c.getBoundingClientRect();mx=e.clientX-r.left;my=e.clientY-r.top;};
onpointerleave=()=>{mx=-999;my=-999;};
(function loop(){
  x.clearRect(0,0,w,h);
  balls.forEach(b=>{
    b.x+=b.vx;b.y+=b.vy;
    if(b.x-b.r<0){b.x=b.r;b.vx*=-1;}
    if(b.x+b.r>w){b.x=w-b.r;b.vx*=-1;}
    if(b.y-b.r<0){b.y=b.r;b.vy*=-1;}
    if(b.y+b.r>h){b.y=h-b.r;b.vy*=-1;}
    if(mx!==-999&&my!==-999){
      const dx=b.x-mx,dy=b.y-my,d=Math.hypot(dx,dy);
      if(d<80){
        const f=(80-d)/80,a=Math.atan2(dy,dx);
        b.vx+=Math.cos(a)*f*0.6;b.vy+=Math.sin(a)*f*0.6;
      }
    }
    b.vx*=0.97;b.vy*=0.97;
    x.fillStyle=b.color;x.beginPath();x.arc(b.x,b.y,b.r,0,7);x.fill();
  });
  requestAnimationFrame(loop);
})();
<\/script>
</body>
</html>
